pi_items.source: Verified against task description and verifier.py logic.
Verified against task description and verifier.py logic.
Verified via environment installation scripts (install_solvespace.sh) which download real SolveSpace tutorial data (box-parts.zip) directly from solvespace.com into the specified directory.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on 'side.slvs', a real 3D part file downloaded directly from the official SolveSpace tutorial dataset (box-parts.zip). Inspection of the raw SLVS text format confirms it represents a flat rectangular piece with approximate face dimensions of ~185x171 mm and an extrusion depth (thickness) of exactly 5.9944 mm. These physical dimensions align perfectly with the strictly enforced validation thresholds in verifier.py (face width/height > 20mm, edge thickness < 20mm). The verifier logic strictly matches the expected target file paths '/home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/side_face.svg' and '/home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/side_edge.svg' described in the task prompt.
